signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, missing market expectations of 2.4% and remaining near the central bank's target despite global energy volatility.[4] No new GDP or major policy announcements confirmed in results.[4]
